name: Takara Leben Real Estate Investment Corporation
summary: Takara Leben Real Estate Investment Corporation (TLR) was listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Real Estate Investment Trust Securities Market on July 27, 2018. TLR is a diversified J-REIT that has companies boasting expertise and know-how backed by an extensive track record in office, residential, hotel, retail and other properties - Takara Leben Co., Ltd., PAG Investment Management Limited, Kyoritsu Maintenance Co., Ltd. and Yamada Denki Co., Ltd.- as sponsors. TLR aims to realize 竏堙傔ｬﾃｬsteady growth竏堙傔ｬﾃｮ and 竏堙傔ｬﾃｬstable management竏堙傔ｬﾃｮ by utilizing a multi-sponsor management structure that combines the expertise and know-how of each of the sponsors, which boast different strengths. In addition, TLR aims to realize 竏堙傔ｬﾃｬmaximization of unitholder value,竏堙傔ｬﾃｮ 竏堙傔ｬﾃｬcreation of a sustainable environment竏堙傔ｬﾃｮ and 竏堙傔ｬﾃｬcontribution to communities and society竏堙傔ｬﾃｮ in order to remain the unitholders' diversified J-REIT of choice.
